title: Pacific Liner
writer: John Twist, Anthony Coldeway, Henry Roberts Symonds
actors: Victor McLaglen, Chester Morris, Wendy Barrie
plot: The S. S. Arcturus sails from Shanghai to San Francisco, and Dr. Jim Craig takes the post of ship's physician in order to be near Ann Grayson, the ship's nurse. Chief Engineer 'Crusher" McKay also has his eyes on Ann, and this bri...
